remarks: Welcome to Best Nails! A well established and highly reputable salon located on busling Hope Street in the desireable Glenbrook section of Stamford. Operating sucessfully for over 22 years. Rare opportunity to step into a fully operatonal income producing salon with a loyal and consistent customer base already in place. Turnkey space comes fully equipped with over $30,000 in equipment including: 4 manicure stations, 4 Fully plumbed custom Pedicure Spa Chairs with built in massage, 2 private treatment rooms for waxing, facials and massage. Strategically positioned in one of Stamford's busiest neighborhoods with daily traffic counts of approximately 20,000 cars per day along with consistent foot traffic. Whether you are an eperienced salon owner looking to expand or an entrpreneur seeking a profitable ready to go business, Best Nails presents an exceptional investment opportunity in a thriving location. Current owner is retiring but willing to stay on during transition period. You can recoup your investment in the first year. Owner would like to keep the sale confidential to curent employees. Financing Example: If you obtain the business for full price $58,000 and get financing for $40,000 @ 7 per cent interest for 30 years, then it would cost you only $266/month plus rent of $2100 = $2,366 per month or less than $79/day and you own the business! Two customers per day will cover your expenses. Listing agent has been a customer for 22 years.
